releaseNotes:
Release v0.1.21

New Features:
- Solution container, symbol index, and IDE features (PS-95)
- Cross-subgraph node indexing and navigation (PS-98)
- Console-to-graph navigation (PS-97)
- Graph search and navigation (Cmd+F) (PS-96)

Bug Fixes:
- Fix activeIndex reset, redundant close, trailing newline
